description:
Banyan Tree Lang Co - Nơi lưu giữ vẻ đẹp tự nhiên tại Đà Nẵng

Banyan Tree Lang Co, một khách sạn 5.0 sao nằm tại thành phố Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh và thiên nhiên tươi đẹp. Khách sạn này được xây dựng vào năm 2012 và được cải tạo lại vào năm 2023, đảm bảo sự hiện đại và tiện nghi cho du khách.

Với 85 phòng nghỉ sang trọng, Banyan Tree Lang Co mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Từ khách sạn, du khách có thể ngắm nhìn vẻ đẹp tự nhiên của thành phố Đà Nẵng và cách trung tâm thành phố chỉ 60 km. Đối với những du khách đến bằng máy bay, khách sạn cũng có vị trí thuận lợi, cách sân bay chỉ 75 phút đi xe.

Thời gian nhận phòng tại Banyan Tree Lang Co là từ 03:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng là 12:00 PM. Đối với chính sách trẻ em, khách sạn không cho phép trẻ em nghỉ miễn phí. Có thể có các khoản phụ phí áp dụng. Bất kể bạn là du khách muốn thư giãn hay khám phá vẻ đẹp của Đà Nẵng, Banyan Tree Lang Co sẽ là nơi lưu giữ những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ cho bạn.

Banyan Tree Lang Co tọa lạc tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam và mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng. Khách sạn này có các cửa hàng, quầy bar và salon để du khách có thể thỏa sức mua sắm và thư giãn. Du khách cũng có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ spa và tham quan khu vườn tuyệt đẹp của khách sạn. Nếu muốn tương tác với người khác, du khách có thể dùng khu vực tiếp khách chung với TV hoặc tham gia vào buổi hát karaoke. Cuối cùng, Banyan Tree Lang Co còn có cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để du khách có thể mua những món quà độc đáo và đáng nhớ.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Banyan Tree Lang Co

Banyan Tree Lang Co là một kỳ quan thể thao với nhiều tiện nghi đẳng cấp. Khách sạn này có hồ bơi trong nhà và ngoài trời để bạn thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian nước tuyệt đẹp. Nếu bạn là người yêu golf, Banyan Tree Lang Co có sân golf riêng tại chính khuôn viên khách sạn. Bạn cũng có thể rèn luyện sức khỏe tại phòng tập gym hoặc sân tennis. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp các hoạt động thể thao trên nước như lướt ván buồm, lặn ngắm san hô và đánh cá. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn bên bể bơi ngoài trời hoặc tận hưởng bãi biển riêng tư của khách sạn. Banyan Tree Lang Co là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn kết hợp nghỉ dưỡng và thể dục.

sample_comments.text: Những bức ảnh trên mạng thật sự đẹp như khi nhìn thấy bằng mắt. Đẹp đến không thể tin được. Mức độ riêng tư rất cao, không có quá nhiều người, bãi biển và hồ bơi đều rất đẹp, nhân viên rất thân thiện, dịch vụ rất tốt. Các phòng đều rất đẹp, mỗi ngày tôi đều có giấc ngủ rất ngon, thích chiếc gối và ga trải giường mình chọn, đệm cũng rất thoải mái. Đạp xe trong khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng là một trải nghiệm rất thú vị. Bữa sáng tại watercourt cũng tuyệt vời, có rất nhiều lựa chọn, trái cây tươi ngon, và còn có thể tự pha trộn nước trái cây, thật là khỏe mạnh.
sample_comments.title: Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Li,

Thank you for sharing such a wonderful review of your recent stay with us. We are truly delighted to know that the beauty of the resort exceeded your expectations and that you enjoyed the sense of privacy, tranquility, and our beach and pool surroundings. It is especially rewarding to hear that you had restful nights and appreciated the comfort of your room, from the pillows and linens to the mattress.

Your kind compliments on our Watercourt breakfast are greatly appreciated. We are thrilled that you enjoyed the variety, freshness of the fruits, and the opportunity to create your own healthy selections.

Thank you once again for your generous feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, mến khách, cảnh quan rất đẹp, nhiều hoạt động cho trẻ em.

sample_comments.text: Nhân viên đều vui vẻ, lịch sự và thân thiện. Vì cách Đà Nẵng và Huế hơn 1 giờ đồng hồ, đây là nơi lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tránh xa sự ồn ào thành phố và tận hưởng không gian riêng tư, thư giãn. Mặc dù không có nhà hàng hay siêu thị nào gần đó, nhưng các tiện nghi và nhà hàng trong khách sạn đủ để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu. Bữa tối tại nhà hàng trong khách sạn khoảng 5000 yên một người. Nếu muốn tiết kiệm, bạn vẫn có thể ăn với giá khoảng 2000-3000 yên. Phòng khách sạn sang trọng, rất sạch sẽ và mang lại thời gian thư giãn tuyệt vời. Tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn xứng đáng với số tiền bỏ ra.

sample_comments.positives: Vị trí đẹp, yên tĩnh, phong cảnh hữu tình, lãng mạn

sample_comments.text: Vào tháng 6, tôi đã có chuyến du lịch thai giáo đến Việt Nam, nơi mà mọi người nói là rất nóng. Nơi ở cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng khoảng một giờ, nhưng họ đã giúp tôi đặt xe một cách thoải mái và đưa tôi đến khu nghỉ dưỡng an toàn. Nơi ở thật sự tuyệt vời như trong ảnh. Ga trải giường rất sạch sẽ và đã được vệ sinh kỹ lưỡng. Tôi đã mang theo vòi sen có bộ lọc, nhưng trong suốt hai đêm ba ngày, màu của bộ lọc không thay đổi, cho thấy nước rất sạch. Trong khu nghỉ dưỡng có dịch vụ massage rất thích hợp cho phụ nữ mang thai, giúp tôi thư giãn. Và bữa sáng thật sự rất ngon!! Tôi đã có những ngày rất vui vẻ trong hai đêm ba ngày. Lần sau, tôi muốn quay lại cùng với em bé.

sample_comments.text:
Nếu bạn muốn một kỳ nghỉ ở biệt thự bên hồ bơi, đây là sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Bạn có thể bơi lội trong phòng với cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp của biển và bờ biển cùng những ngọn núi mây, một khung cảnh chỉ có ở Bali, Phuket hay Koh Samui, và điều này tạo nên sự đặc biệt riêng của nơi đây. 
Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có nhiều hoạt động miễn phí đa dạng (thuyền motor, thuyền kênh, v.v.) và nhà hàng cũng rất tuyệt. So với độ tuổi của nó, nơi này được duy trì tốt nên tình trạng phòng cũng rất tốt. 
Nhân viên rất thân thiện và các quản gia cũng hỗ trợ rất tốt trong việc tổ chức các dịch vụ tại khu nghỉ dưỡng, giúp cho chuyến đi của chúng tôi trở nên tuyệt vời. Có hai quản gia phụ trách, nhưng chỉ có một người tên được ghi lại. Đó là Phung (Jennie), người đã làm rất tốt công việc của mình, khiến chuyến đi của chúng tôi trở nên tuyệt vời. Cảm ơn rất nhiều.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing at best, insulting at worst.
sample_comments.text: It is a difficult thing when you have to give a negative review to a place that has a worldwide impeccable reputation. I've stayed at the Banyan Tree in the Maldives, Bangkok, and Koh Samui, so when I saw one in Lang Co, I wanted to get away from the cacophony of Danang, where I am staying for a month. Sadly, besides the terrific host, Tuan, who was perfect during my entire stay, everything about the Banyan Tree Lang Co was a letdown. First of all, the Saffron Thai restaurant was a pure disappointment on every imaginable level. I am retired and live in Bangkok two months a year, and I can assure you that this restaurant is not better than a nice hearty meal at a night market anywhere in Thailand: most iconic Thai dishes are not on the menu (steamed whole fish in lime juice, Pad Kra Pao, duck curry, etc). The menu is extremely basic and boring, and even insulting to Thai culture, and I can only guess that they are lazy to source real authentic food, such as whole fresh fish or put some effort into more creative curries. Besides the disappointing quality of the food, I had made reservations about two months in advance, asking for a nice table with a view: upon arrival, I was stunned that they gave me a sad little table at the entrance of the restaurant, which was quite insulting. Yes, why not place the person who writes you two months in advance to deal with incoming traffic even though half the restaurant will be empty? Besides this first disappointing restaurant, I tried the other two eateries, the Italian bistro and the alleged Vietnamese restaurant. The Italian lunch was fine (nothing to write home about or allow rental space in your brain for more than those few hours), as I didn't want to risk it and ordered a burger & beer, with a burrata salad, which was "fine." I had dinner one night at the Vietnamese place, and the meal, yet again, was an insult to the Vietnamese people: I ordered the pho; I didn't want to take more risks, so why not stick with something basic like pho? Sadly, it came out lukewarm with stubborn pieces of meat that was not edible. Do not get me started on reviewing the breakfast. Extremely high carbs, any protein they had were simply garnishes to the other high carb dishes (noodles, Hue dumplings, etc); the few meat entrees at breakfast consisted of dry (old?) meat that was simply very low quality. If all of this isn't enough to dissuade you from coming here, staff members on the grounds were generally rude and dismissive when I asked for directions; the gym is quite an insult (meaning, there you cannot do a workout, period) to a high end hotel that traps you in a location where you have nothing to do: yes, nothing to do because the water in the pool is very warm, the hotel has not invested in a water cooling system to keep the water cool: and are you sure you want to take their hiking trips in the oppressive purgatory heat? Finally, I must recognize that many people complain about the highway robbery of the prices of food in the reviews. Yes, be prepared to pay $30 for pho and $5 for a 12oz bottle of water because they do not have complementary table water. But I feel the prices are fair, honestly, as this is a high end hotel. But tragically, and significantly, the quality of the food does NOT commensurate with the prices, so you will be stunned at the paradox. Overall, I cannot imagine how this place can thrive for so many years. Perhaps only people who make mistakes once in their lives will come here, and I suppose there are enough people in this world to make mistakes so that this place can. That's all.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Hung,

Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback regarding your recent stay with us here.

We are truly sorry to learn that your experience at Banyan Tree Lang Co did not meet your expectations, especially given your previous positive experiences with Banyan Tree properties. Please accept our sincere apologies for the disappointments you encountered during your stay.

Your comments have been taken very seriously and shared with the respective teams for immediate review and improvement. We genuinely value your candid feedback, as it helps us better understand where we have fallen short and where we must improve.

Our team will also reach out to you personally via email to express our sincere apologies and discuss your experience further.

Thank you once again for your feedback, and we truly regret that we were unable to provide the experience you had hoped for.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Loved the little oasis in Lang co. 
Staff was excellent and very friendly from villa host to the garden and housekeeping team 
Food was delicious 
Activities were fun
sample_comments.negatives:
The main con for me was actually the spa. We were so excited for our spa day and spent a lot of money to get pampered with a massage and scrub. The scrub was fun and different for us. I've never had a Balinese massage but the brochure had said medium to strong, I asked my lady twice for stronger pressure and nothing changed. It also felt like she was going through the motions vs focusing on areas I had highlighted. I was really disappointed to spend that much for our massages and not feel relaxed or knots worked out. 

It's a bit far from other locales and destinations you might want to see which can be a pro unless you're using it as a launching base.

sample_comments.title: A huge disappointment for a famous brand name
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at Banyan Tree resorts in Asia before so we had high expectation for this resort. Turned out it was nothing like Banyan Tree quality, not even for a 5 star hotel resort. 
Pros: The room was clean and the bed was comfortable. The room set up is like a small regular 5 star hotel.
Cons: so many of them. The landscaping was like an abandoned resort with all the weed and plants grew freely blocking the path to the sea. The pool was dirty and no one came to clean during our 3 nights. The hotel key lock was so hard to use. The high tea was a joke of a piece of tiny jelly and a piece of Bánh Lọc along with cheap local tea.
The staff seemed like they hate doing their job. Breakfast was very limited of choice. Because the resort had cheap promotion for the locals, it was crowed and messy just like a 3 star hotel where people fighting to grab food. The beach sand is very rough and full of dead shell. We could name more but has no more space. It is a rip off. Never come back.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Thuy,
First of all we would like to thank you for choosing us. However, clearly we failed to live up to your expectations. We would like to extend our sincere apology for any inconvenience you encountered during your stay. We regret that we could have done something for you and your family if all these issues were communicated to us during your stay. Definitely we will take your feedback for further improvement. 
Regarding your comment about our associates, it was certainly not our intention to make you feel we were not enjoying our jobs and I would like to assure you that most of us have our hearts in the right place and do take pride in providing our guests with memorable experiences and always try our best to make this happen. 
We are thankful that you brought these concerns to our attention, these gives us an opportunity to re-look at our high maintained standards, to ensure consistency and great service to all guests. 
Best regards, 
Figen Bulut
Hotel Manager

sample_comments.title: Exceptional hotel by a wonderful beach
sample_comments.positives: Everything was perfect. Banyan Tree Lang Co is the ideal place for a relaxing stay at the beach with easy access to Hue and Hoi An. The villa was beautiful and spotless, the hotel facilities were wonderful, and the staff went above and beyond to make our stay perfect. Special thanks to our villa host Yen for her exceptionally attentive service, and to our guide Hung who took us on a fascinating tour to Hue.

sample_comments.title: Banyan never again
sample_comments.text: It was my first and last time at a Banyan Tree hotel. Despite it's location and always willing staff, this hotel is just not up to the standard I expected. The GM was nowhere to be found. In fact, one could feel his/her absence in a plethora of details: a broken lamp silicone glued, a typo in the welcoming message, a digitally imposed signature upon the welcoming message by an ASIA manager, stickers over information on in-room info, a broken telephone cord, a bat inside the room upon arrival... The restaurant options were sub par and very limited and the prices were outrageous for the quality provided. I was charged 10.000.000 dongs (454 euros) for airport transfer and 4hours of car. Worst of all, they call you many times to triple check info that you will feel like an old fashioned cable girl instead of a guest... Pick another hotel. I wish I had.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Sofia, 

Thank you so much for choosing Banyan Tree Lang Co. I hope that my earlier email has reached you well following your stay with us. I have read in depth each of your comments in regards to your valuable feedback. Once again, my apologies since our team was only partially to recover from concerns raised, this does disappoint me as it is not our usual standard.

We hope and trust that this unfortunate experience will not completely tarnish your opinion of Banyan Tree and that we will have the opportunity to welcome you back to our Banyan Tree Lang Co on a future occasion for a more pleasurable experience.

Best regards,

Brett Burton
Area General Manager

sample_comments.positives: Everything about our stay was great! Staff are very kind and attentive, offered us a proper 5-star experience. Thank you all for making our visit to Vietnam so special, we will come back!

sample_comments.title: Super good experience
sample_comments.text: The photos online are just as beautiful as seeing them in person, incredibly beautiful. The privacy is very high, and there aren't too many people. The beach and the pool are both beautiful, and the staff are very friendly with great service. The rooms are also very nice, and I sleep well every day. I love the pillows and sheets that I can choose for myself, and the mattress is very comfortable. Riding a bike in the resort is also a very enjoyable experience. The breakfast at Watercourt is amazing, with a wide variety of choices, and the fruits are delicious and fresh. You can also mix and juice them yourself, which is very healthy.

sample_comments.title: Excepcional
sample_comments.positives: El lugar está apartado pero hay medios que te ofrece el hotel para ir a Hue, Hoi An y al aeropuerto. Pedimos la villa delante de la playa y es espectacular. Cualquier cosa que desees se la comunicas al personal y todo son facilidades y amabilidad. El desayuno es el más variado y surtido que he visto nunca (y he viajado bastante). Puedes desayunar al estilo vietnamita o internacional. Los restaurantes son inmejorables, incluidos el japonés y asiatico del hotel Angsana, que está al lado. Ofrecen cantidad de actividades (gratis). Nosotros nos apuntamos a tiro con arco, taichi, etc. Con la habitación tienes derecho a un masaje de 60 minutos, que te deja como nuevo. Tiene un snack bar en la que te hacen los más variados cócteles, gracias a la maestria de Nam. Puedes moverte por las instalaciones con bicicleta o llamar para que te envien un boogie y te lleve a donde quieras. La playa es enorme, prácticamente no encuentras a nadie. Los dias que estuvimos estaba el mar un poco revuelto. Me recordaba a las playas de España. Especial mención a Man, que fue el encargado de que nuestra estancia alli fuera una de las mejores experiencias.
sample_comments.negatives: todo fue perfecto

sample_comments.title: great for families
sample_comments.text: Farther away from the other resorts but well worth it. The Banyan property is gorgeous along with the facilities that can be used with Angsana that is right next door. Great for kids who can use the kids club at Angsana and their pool, beach and great for adults who prefer serenity and luxury at Banyan. All the rooms has their own private pool even the studio villas. Check for weather as we had rain so couldn't use the outdoor facility but i can imagine how perfect if the weather had worked out.

Thank you so much for letting us know how much you enjoyed your time with us.

We truly appreciate the amazing feedback you have shared as it is feedback such as yours that provides motivation to continue delighting our future guests.

It was a pleasure to have you with us and we look forward to welcoming you back to Banyan Tree Lang Co in the future for another memorable stay.

Best wishes,

Glen Cook
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Increíble
sample_comments.positives: Absolutamente todo: la privacidad, el servicio, la calidad de las instalaciones y de la comida... Increíble todo. Acabamos aquí nuestro viaje de novios y nos llenaron de detalles todos los días. Increíble y más que recomendable
sample_comments.negatives: Todo fue increíble, no hay "pero" que valga

sample_comments.title: Great Hotel
sample_comments.text: Our stay in Banyan tree was wonderful, the staffs service are great, and the buggy service are fast most of time within few minute. The food is good, but very very SLOW!! We need to wait average of 1~2 hrs for our food to be ready, and cost deep compare to Vietnam standard. The staff in the restuarant service are very slow, and keep forgeting what we ask for. So should prepare some thing to eat if traveling with young children. Free shuttle bus to Da Nang, Hoi An, and Hue are great!!
sample_comments.positives: privacy, service, and service

sample_comments.title: Very good

sample_comments.negatives: Petite piscine avec peu de place et plage peu praticable si forte chaleur.

sample_comments.title: The staff are amazing! So sweet and attentive!
sample_comments.positives: The staff, service and villa

Le spa et les massages très professionnels
sample_comments.negatives: Tout était parfait

sample_comments.title: Banyan Tree on the beach
sample_comments.text: Banyan Tree doesn't mess around, and all needs are accommodated here. Villas are large with lovely plunge pools, the beach is steps away. Hue is about a 30 minute drive. The spa treatments are to die for and a must.
sample_comments.positives: Stellar service; plunge pool; awesome spa

sample_comments.title: Exceptionnel
sample_comments.positives: Un hôtel exceptionnel à tous point de vue ; la villa sur l'océan avec une piscine à débordement est somptueuse, l'architecture intérieure est soignée et qualitative, la literie et les services sont haut de gamme. Le personnel est professionnel et disponible à tous moment pour répondre à nos demandes. Cet hôtel est la définition du luxe. Merci beaucoup

sample_comments.title: five star standard resort
sample_comments.text: Roomy and 5 star standard although we would much prefer their cliff villa - which are not yet built! It's a lagoon villa situated on the plain so the view to the sea is limited and not as spontaneous as a cliff villa.
sample_comments.positives: comfort, luxury, relaxing

sample_comments.title: Séjour inoubliable
sample_comments.positives: L'endroit est magnifique et le complexe hôtelier merveilleux. Le personnel est aux petits soins, toujours aimable et souriant. Le buffet du petit-déjeuner est juste incroyable!

sample_comments.title: 3 nights stay at Ocean beach front villa
sample_comments.text: It was a most pleasant experience as the staff service was exemplary. Location is bit off which makes the place very tranquil and out of this world. The jacuzzi was not working even after first repair but thankfully it was all sorted out. This is important as the weather was chilly and the heated jacuzzi makes all the difference. Didn't get to enjoy the pool as it was too cold. The beach was deserted too. Villa is a distance from the beach actually and the waves were strong. Thankfully the boat between Banyan and Angsana, the buggy rides and the restaurants there are excellent. We went to the Saffron restaurant twice as it was most extraordinary! The food was excellent, the staff were exceptional and the atmosphere was amazing. Definitely going back again! Really memorable dining experience! The hotel staff are all very responsive, helpful and polite. Really hospitable and they really go out of their way to make our stay unforgettable!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Tan,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review of your stay with us.

We are delighted to know that you had a most pleasant experience and that our team's service left a strong impression. Your kind words truly mean a lot to us, as creating memorable and heartfelt experiences is at the core of what we do.

We appreciate your understanding regarding the jacuzzi issue and are pleased to hear it was resolved to your satisfaction. Your feedback on the weather and villa location is well noted, and we are glad the tranquility and unique atmosphere still allowed you to enjoy the setting. It is wonderful to hear that you made full use of the inter-resort boat, buggy services, and dining options, and we are especially thrilled that Saffron stood out as a highlight of your stay.

Thank you once again for your generous comments and recommendation. We very much look forward to welcoming you back for another unforgettable stay and many more memorab

sample_comments.negatives: Le Wi-Fi pourrait être mieux

sample_comments.text: I've been to Da Nang several times, but this is my first visit to Banyan Tree Lang Co! The friendly manager Man left a strong impression, and I'd love to visit again! It's convenient to get to the golf course by buggy, and I like that there's a Michelin restaurant too! I want to visit again next time!!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Tout, c'est un lieu de rêve. Tout est parfait.
sample_comments.negatives: Le restaurant thaïlandais est vraiment très cher.

sample_comments.title: I can confidently recommend it.
sample_comments.text: The staff were all bright, polite, and kind. Recommended for those who want to avoid the hustle and bustle of the city and spend time slowly in a private space, as it is more than an hour away from Da Nang and Hue. There are no facilities nearby, such as restaurants or supermarkets, but all necessary amenities and the hotel restaurant are sufficient. Dinner at the hotel's restaurant is about 5,000 yen per person. If you want to keep costs low, you can eat for around 2,000 to 3,000 yen. The guest rooms have a luxurious feel and are very clean, allowing for a very indulgent experience. It was a hotel stay that was worth the price.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mihiro,

Thank you for taking the time to share your impressions of your stay with us. We are delighted to hear that you appreciated the warmth and kindness of our associates, the comfort and cleanliness of our guest rooms, and the overall sense of relaxation and privacy our resort offers. We also appreciate your detailed comments on the dining experience. Your feedback regarding pricing and value is very helpful, and we will continue striving to offer both quality and variety to meet our guests' expectations.

It was our pleasure to host you, and we hope to welcome you back for another indulgent and restful stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Expérience fantastique dont on se souviendra longtemps
sample_comments.positives: Un vrai paradis. Encore plus beau que ce que l'on imaginait. La villa est splendide, très grande et ultra confortable. Tout est fait pour que l'on se sente bien : vélos, buggies, yoga, nombreuses activités proposées. Le personnel est parfait. Très belle piscine et plage privée. Le buffet du petit déjeuner est exquis, et le restaurant Saffron est divin.

sample_comments.title: Nearly Perfect Stay with Just One Minor Flaw
sample_comments.text: Banyan Tree was truly exceptional --- the service throughout the resort was warm, attentive, and top-notch. Everything felt perfectly managed and welcoming. The only slight downside was the staff member who gave us the initial hotel tour; perhaps they were tired, but they didn't come across as particularly friendly. Still, this was a very small issue in an otherwise flawless experience.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jun,

Thank you for your kind words and valuable feedback. We are delighted to hear you enjoyed the warm and attentive service throughout the resort. We apologize for the unexpected experience during the hotel tour and will address this to ensure every guest feels warmly greeted. We truly appreciate your understanding and hope to welcome you back for another flawless stay soon!

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Aufgrund unserer späten Anreise konnten wir in der Villa einen Quick Check-in machen, das hat den Prozess stark beschleunigt, sodass wir schnell zum Abendessen gehen konnten. Während unseres Aufenthalts hatte einer von uns Geburtstag und es gab sehr persönliche Aufmerksamkeiten wie einen Früchtekuchen mit Kerze & Geburtstagsständchen beim Frühstück, ein Buggy mit Geburtstagsschmuck (das Foto von uns davor erhielten wir beim Check-out sogar eingerahmt zum Mitnehmen) sowie einen Geburtstagskuchen & ein entspannendes Fußbad in der Villa. Die Atmosphäre und das Essen im Saffron waren herausragend und das Geld unbedingt wert! Auch der inkludierte Flughafentransfer überzeugte bei einer Fahrtzeit von etwa einer Stunde. Leider spielte das Wetter während unseres Aufenthaltes nicht unbedingt mit, bei Sonnenschein bietet die Villa jedoch eine grandiose Aussicht - sowohl vom Pool als auch aus der Badewanne.
sample_comments.negatives: Leider war das Ambiente im Frühstücksrestaurant nicht sehr angenehm. Es herrschte eine schlechte Beleuchtung sowie Einrichtung wie in einem Tagungshotel. Auch gab es leider so gut wie keine veganen (zumindest laktosefreien) Optionen, obwohl extra abgefragt wurde, ob man Allergien o.ä. hätte. Von anderen Hotels in dieser Preisklasse sind wir es gewohnt, dass es eine Vorab-Abfrage gibt, in der man angeben kann, ob es einen besonderen Grund für den Aufenthalt gibt (Geburtstag, Honeymoon etc.), welche Kissen man präferiert, ob man Allergien hat etc. Wir hatten für den Geburtstag einen Halbtagesausflug mit privatem Fahrer gebucht und konnten so die Route ganz individuell bestimmen. Der Fahrer verstand jedoch kaum Englisch, sodass wir unsere eigene Navigationsapp nutzen mussten, um ans Ziel zu komme. In der Villa waren einige Oberflächen nicht gereinigt (z.B. die Ablagefläche oberhalb des Bettes, dort sah man Staub sowie die Abdrücke abgestellter Gläser) und das Telefon im Bad fiel mitten in der Nacht mit lautem Geräusch von der Wand. Wir legten es auf den Esstisch, dort blieb es jedoch während unseres gesamten Aufenthalts liegen, anstatt wieder angebracht zu werden.

sample_comments.response:
Dear Abdulwahab, 

Thank you for your kind rating and for choosing to stay with us at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô!
We are delighted to know you enjoyed your experience, especially our service and facilities. Your feedback means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Ein Traumhotel, das seinen Preis hat.
sample_comments.positives: Wir hatten eine wirklich wunderschöne Lagunen-Villa. Der Blick von unserem privaten Pool auf die Lagune war wirklich unbezahlbar, ganz so, als wäre man mitten im Dschungel. Es gab so gut wie keine Mücken, das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und das Frühstück sehr vielseitig und reichhaltig! Der Strand war wirklich sauber und man konnte Ewigkeiten am Wasser entlang laufen. Es gibt eine kleine Klinik auf dem wunderschönen, mit ganz tollen Pflanzen angelegten Hotelgelände, zu der man auch hin kann, wenn es einmal kleinere Probleme gibt. Unser persönliche Ansprechpartner Tuan gab sich wirklich Mühe, uns jeden Wunsch von den Lippen abzulesen. Er besorgte sogar ein Antibiotikum für meine Frau aus der Apotheke im nächsten Örtchen.
sample_comments.negatives: Die Speisekarte im vietnamesischen Restaurant Watercourt und dem thailändischen Restaurant Saffron war relativ überschaubar. Preislich bewegen sich beide Restaurants, und vor allem das thailändische, am oberen Ende. Leider ist das Hotel auch wirklich am A**** der Welt gelegen, so dass man nicht mal eben mit einem Grab in die benachbarte Ortschaft zum Abendessen fahren kann. Wir waren also mehr oder weniger gezwungen, im Hotel zu essen. Uns war aber von vorne herein klar, dass ein Hotel der Banyan-Tree- Gruppe mit seinen fünf Sternen nun einmal seinen Preis hat. Es wäre nur schön gewesen, ab und zu mal lokal essen zu gehen.

sample_comments.title: 3rd visit
sample_comments.text: This time, I stayed in a beach villa, and the weather wasn't hot, so I spent a lot of time outdoors. Although the water was too cold to go into the pool, I enjoyed the warm jacuzzi a lot. When I stayed in a hill villa before, it was too hot to go out onto the terrace, but the beach villa had a garden with trees and grass, which was really nice. However, the hill villa had a dining area and a much larger living room, so I felt a bit lacking in the indoor space of the beach villa.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Seungmin,

Thank you for staying with us for the third time. We are glad to know that you enjoyed the Beach Villa's garden and outdoor space, especially with the pleasant weather. Though the pool was a bit chilly, it is great to hear you relaxed in the warm jacuzzi. We appreciate your feedback on the indoor space compared to the Hill Villa and hope to welcome you back again soon!

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Wunderbarer Aufenthalt, der unsere Erwartungen absolut erfüllt hat!
sample_comments.positives: Wunderschöne Anlage, wunderbare Natur, toller Blick aus der Oceanview Pool Villa. Sehr guter Service, insbesondere durch die "Villa-Butlerin", die nahezu rund um die Uhr ansprechbar war und alles anch unseren Wünschen arrangierte.
sample_comments.negatives: Das Housekeeping und der Turndown Service könnten etwas gründlicher und "liebevoller" sein, das haben wir in anderen (auch Banyan Tree-) Hotels noch etwas besser in Erinnerung.

sample_comments.title: Amazing Resort
sample_comments.text: Beautiful, relaxing and peaceful. All is perfect! The location is in a peaceful setting an hour away from Danang. Tranquility awaits!
sample_comments.room_type: Two Bedroom Hillside Sea View Villa with Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Ein unfassbar tolles Hotel. Die Lage, der Service, die Aussicht, die Villen-alles hervorragend.

sample_comments.title: Luxurious romantic hideaway
sample_comments.text: For a five star resort, it lives up to the billing with great services and amenities. Staff were kind and attentive. Breakfast features abundant local and international menu, with views of the beach. If you're looking for a luxurious private retreat, then this is the perfect secluded slice of paradise. However, if you're looking for a more authentic experience of the locale, consider booking elsewhere. While we did enjoy our lagoon villa, which is beautiful with stunning views of the mountains, the resort location is remote and somewhat cut off from the rest of the region, requiring 1-2 hour transport to visit other destinations like Hue, Danang and Hoi An. Good for honeymooners, maybe not so much for explorers.

Franck Rodriguez

Overall still recommend the place during a warm day.

sample_comments.title: Wunderbarer Ort - kleines Paradies
sample_comments.positives:
Nach einer längeren Fahrt aus Hué, gab es ein sehr freundliches Willkommen. Alles perfekt vorbereitet und organisiert. Wir hatten eine der Villen am Hang gebucht mit wunderschönem Blick auf das Meer und die Berge.

Während des gesamten Aufenthaltes hat sich Yen exzellent um alle Anliegen und Wünsche gekümmert. Immer erreichbar und sehr angenehm im Kontakt.

Das Frühstücksbüffet war mit Abstand eines der besten, welches wir genießen durften. Sehr abwechslungsreich und immer frisch. Es bleiben keine Wünsche offen, ob asiatische Gerichte oder Klassiker der Frühstückskultur. Auch hier ein tolles Team. My, Y, Yen, Kieun und NGO waren immer präsent, super freundlich. Tolles Team.

Das Spa war ebenfalls sehr stilvoll und professionell.

Das ganze Team der Buggy Fahrer, war immer gelassen, humorvoll und sehr schnell da.

Auch in der Bar blieb kein Wunsch offen. DAT und die anderen Bar Mixer haben uns exzellent Cocktails gemacht.

Insgesamt sehr, sehr empfehlenswert.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
Need a Seaview room rather than Hill + Sea view for most unobstructed view of the ocean.

Go early for breakfast as it can get crowded. Limited food options within the compound and not easy to travel out. 
Main swimming pool is extremely small.
Staff was helpful and courteous.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you very much for staying at Banyan Tree Lang Co and your candid review of the things that made you feel uncomfortable during the stay.

We truly appreciate that you brought these feedbacks to our attention, these gives us an opportunity to re-look at our high maintained standards, to ensure consistency and great services to all our valued guests, at all times

Once again, we thank for your kind rating and look forward to welcoming you back to Banyan Tree Lang Co in the future for another memorable stay. 

Best Wishes,

Glen Cook

Christmas holiday was still the raining season in central Vietnam. Stormy weather when we were there. This resort would be a lovely choice during dry season.

And if you are a golfer, there's a Golf course adjacent to the property. Although it was raining almost entirely the time we were there, the resort is charming and the staff helpful and attentive.

sample_comments.title: Oase der Ruhe und Entspannung
sample_comments.positives: Die absolute Ruhe, Privatsphäre in der Villa, wunderschöne gepflegte Anlage, freundliches und zuvorkommendes Personal, Villa Host kümmert sich um jedes Anliegen, hervorragendes Frühstück.

sample_comments.positives:
Alles! Das Hotel ist ein absoluter Traum.Das Personal liest einem jeden Wunsch von den Lippen ab.
Speziell unser Villa Host "Man" war ganz toll und überraschte uns täglich mit vielen Aufmerksamkeiten. Er war die Herzlichkeit in Person.
Auch „Quynn" im. Rest. Saffron verwöhnte uns sehr. Das ist Dienstleistung auf höchstem Niveau!

sample_comments.title: A true Banyan Tree experience
sample_comments.text: Amazing hotel complex and grounds, though a good 2 hours from Da Nang airport. Excellent staff. Go for a villa on the hill to really appreciate the terrain. On-site restaurant is a culinary retreat. Our only small complaint is the prices on the wine list; the ordinary wines we had in Hoi An were priced with a 6- or 7-time markup. Interestingly enough, all other liquor and room service were reasonably priced.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Vassilios,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback following your stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed the overall experiences and the attentive service from our team. Your kind comments are truly appreciated. At the same time, thank you for sharing your observation regarding the wine pricing. Your feedback is very valuable to us, and we will certainly share it with our team for review.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: One Bedroom Hillside Sea View Villa with Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Einer der schönsten Flecken Erde
sample_comments.positives: Die Lage in der Natur

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: While we stayed at both the InterContinental and Banyan Tree, the latter truly set a new bar for service. Photos don't do the hotel's design justice---it might look simple on screen, but the sheer grandeur of the property in person is breathtaking. More importantly, the service quality at Banyan Tree was profoundly impressive; they have a way of making you feel truly cared for.
sample_comments.response:
Dear S,

Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful experience with us. We are truly honored to know that Banyan Tree Lăng Cô stood out during your stay and left such a strong impression, both in design and service.

We are delighted that the grandeur of our resort and the heartfelt care from our team made your stay memorable. Your kind words are a great encouragement to our colleagues, who are dedicated to creating meaningful and personalized experiences for every guest.

It was our pleasure to welcome you, and we sincerely look forward to hosting you again for another exceptional stay.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: Two Bedroom Hillside Sea View Villa with Private Pool

sample_comments.title: The best place to be!
sample_comments.positives: Einfach alles - es ist das mit Beste Hotel in dem wir je waren! Alles ist einfach perfekt - der Service, der Strand, das Essen! EInfach top!! DANKE

sample_comments.title: A very good relaxation time.
sample_comments.text: It was a location that I found to rest without going anywhere, so the location was not an issue, but if you are a traveler considering external sightseeing, you may need to think about the distance to the city. It was a relaxing vacation in a quiet place, and there was nothing lacking in the meals at the internal restaurant. The internal activities were modest but enjoyable to participate in. The friendly service from the villa manager is also one of the reasons I want to visit this place again. I think I'll go back soon. ^^
sample_comments.response:
Dear 성은,

Thank you for sharing you wonderful review on your recent stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô!

We are pleased to hear that our peaceful location was perfect for a relaxing getaway, and that you enjoyed the dining, activities, and overall atmosphere. Your special mention of the villa manager's warm and attentive service truly means a lot to us and will be shared with the team.

We look forward to welcoming you back again very soon.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Luxuriöses und ruhiges Resort erfüllt alle Ansprüche
sample_comments.positives: Die Villa 123 mit Lagunensicht war überragend. Ausstattung, Pool und Lage sind sehr gut. Insgesamt haben alle Villen einen hohen Standard und erfüllen alle Anforderungen. Insbesondere das Bett war großzügig, man konnte aus einer Vielzahl an Kissen auswählen. Hervorzuheben ist die exzellente Betreuung durch einen persönlichen Ansprechpartner. Bei uns waren das Mr. MAN und Mrs. TUYEN. Stets standen sie bei allen Fragen und Anliegen sogar per WhatsApp zur Verfügung.

sample_comments.title: Quite good however it's a bit inconvenient
sample_comments.text:
We had great experiences at this hotel, especially Villa, food and facilities are amazing!
However 2 things if I have to say the one is too far from the city so We can't use Grab from the hotel, delivery too. Second is hotel staff are amazing but maybe that is their manual to ask about our feedback frequently.
One time is okay, they did ask us every order for food, something like that.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kenta,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback and for highlighting your great experiences, we are truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed these aspects of your stay.

We also appreciate your constructive comments regarding our location and service approach. As our resort is situated in a more secluded area surrounded by nature, ride-hailing and delivery services can indeed be limited, however, our team is always happy to assist with transportation arrangements or dining needs to ensure convenience for our guests.

Regarding the frequency of feedback requests, we sincerely apologize if this felt excessive during your stay. Our team's intention is always to ensure your comfort and satisfaction, and your input helps us refine our service balance moving forward.

Once again, thank you for sharing your thoughts. We truly value your understanding and hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another relaxing stay in the near future.

With warm regards,

Franck Rodrigu

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Tolles Hotel mit sehr aufmerksamen und freundlichen Service.

sample_comments.title: Lovely Resort
sample_comments.text: Great villa with pool, very private and peaceful. Staff very friendly and welcoming the only slight disappointment was the food and higher resort prices for everything as expected.

It was a pleasure having you with us, and we hope to welcome you back for another relaxing stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Absolutes top Hotel mit absolutem top Service. So etwas hatte ich bisher noch nicht. Nicht günstig, aber das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis ist okay. Die Strandvilla ist sehr zu empfehlen. Mega Frühstück.
sample_comments.negatives: Unmöglich etwas zu finden, was einem dort nicht gefällt...

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay!!!
sample_comments.text:
We stayed 2 nights at Banyan Tree and we thoroughly enjoyed our time there for our babymoon. The staff were super welcoming from the moment we got there till when we left. All requests/queries were taken care of by our guest host Bich, who was nothing short of amazing and she was very attentive.

We will definitely come back.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Hoi,

Thank you so much for choosing Banyan Tree Lăng Cô to celebrate such a special occasion as your babymoon.

We are thrilled to know that you had a thoroughly enjoyable stay with us. It is wonderful to hear that our team made you feel so welcomed from the moment you arrived until your departure. A special thank you for recognizing Bích, she will be so happy to know her attentiveness and care made a lasting impression.

We look forward to welcoming you back, perhaps next time with your little one!

Wishing you all the best on your journey ahead.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Oase der Ruhe mit exzellentem Service
sample_comments.positives:
Das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und zuvorkommend! Besonders Bich, die guest Managerin hat sich sehr gut um uns gekümmert.
Die Ausstattung und die Annehmlichkeiten des Hotels sind aussergewöhnlich und alles ist sehr stimmig und durchdacht.

sample_comments.title: Perfect place for our anniversary
sample_comments.text:
We looked for a more secluded, quiet place to celebrate our anniversary. Our stay exceeded our expectation. The personal touches and services were the highlights. The host made sure we were happy with anything the villa and facilities had to offer. He even decorated nicely the villa for our anniversary. What an effort! Resort manager also came to greet us personally at breakfast. All staffs were friendly and helpful. 

The villa was clean and looks like new. Well decorated with all amenities I could think of. The only negative note is the villa next door had a noisy kid, but the noise didn't last long. Sound proof of the villa was excellent. 

Saffron restaurant was good in food and service. Breakfast was one of the best I have ever had in terms of varieties and nutrition values.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Norman,

Thank you for celebrating your anniversary with us at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We are delighted to hear your stay exceeded expectations and that the personal touches, villa decoration, and attentive service made it truly special. Besides, we also take well note your feedback regarding the brief noise disturbance for further improvement and we are glad it did not affect your stay.

Once again, it was our pleasure to have you with us and we hope to welcome you back for another memorable visit soon!

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Ein exklusives Resort mit sehr freundlichen und zuvorkommenden Personal.
sample_comments.positives: Ein außergewöhnliches exklusives Frühstück und dazu ein Engel Windy , sie hat uns auch bei Regentagen den Urlaub so angenehm wie möglich bereitet.

sample_comments.title: It's really so good..
sample_comments.text: There are many free programs inside, and the staff's kindness is truly top-notch ㅠㅠㅠ I definitely want to bring my parents next time. The service satisfaction is extremely high from start to finish! The food is a bit disappointing, but everything else makes up for it.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kam,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share a kind and thoughtful review of your stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. We are looking forward to welcoming your parents and you back to have more seamless experiences in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Das BESTE was wir in Vietnam erleben durften
sample_comments.positives:
Das BESTE was wir während unserer Reise nach Vietnam erleben durften.
Unsere Pool-Villa, das Personal, das Frühstück, die Sauberkeit - einfach nur Klasse !
sample_comments.negatives: Wenn überhaupt es etwas zu verbessern gäbe, dann die Kaffeemaschine auf dem Zimmer. Nur ein Wasserkocher (mit allerdings hochwertigen Teesorten) ist nach meiner Ansicht heute nicht mehr Zeitgemäß. Das ist aber wirklich nur nebensächlich und eher eine Anregung für unseren nächsten Aufenthalt :=)!

sample_comments.title: Amazing place!
sample_comments.text: Perfect place for vacation! Saffron restaurant deserves Michelin star :-)

sample_comments.title: Es lohnt sich hier eine Pause einzulegen, wenn man dem geschäftigen Treiben und den Scharen von Touristen der Städte ent
sample_comments.positives: Lückenlos nach der Ankunft wird das Einchecken bereits in der gebuchten Villa vorgenommen. Für sämtliche Aktivitäten und Buchungen steht ein persönlicher Ansprechpartner zur Verfügung und kümmert sich um den reibungslosen Ablauf. Der Ausblick vom privaten Pool der Lagoon Villen und das sehr komfortable Bett laden dazu ein den gesamten Tag hier zu verbringen. Sollte man sich doch für eine Aktivität entscheiden, dann ist eine morgendliche Yoga Stunde im Pavillon mit Blick auf den Garten und die Lagune auch sehr zu empfehlen.
sample_comments.negatives: Einzig die Nähe zum deutlich wuseligeren Schwesternhotel erinnert, dass die im Banyan Tree Hotel geschaffene Idylle endlich ist.

sample_comments.title: Love it!
sample_comments.text: Got the best sunrise in Vietnam!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Fransisca,

Thank you for sharing with us this wonderful feedback here. It was our great pleasure to have with us and we hope to welcome you and your family back soon to our little paradise.

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Esperienza meravigliosa, gente cordiale e professionale
sample_comments.positives: Tutto meraviglioso, posizione fantastica tra il mare e le montagne

sample_comments.title: 5 star resort
sample_comments.text: Beautiful views. We went in December so it was monsoon season. We couldn't do any sea activities at all. But we took the day tour bus to hue and Hoi an. Recommend staying a night in Hou an as it's so beautiful. There are exercise activities to join in the resort which is very fun and amazing. The spa is pretty expensive. Lots of food and coffee options in the hotel
sample_comments.response:
Dear See,

Thank you for staying with us at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô and for posting nice and thoughtful comments on us. We are delighted to learn that you enjoyed a remarkable stay with us.

Wish you all the best from our beautiful Lăng Cô bay area and all of us will definitely hope to see you as soonest.

Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: Three Bedroom Hillside Ocean View Villa with Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Uitstekend
sample_comments.positives:
Wij hadden een Lagoon villa. Lag prima, comfortabel en lekker rustig. Vanwege het weer was het prive zwembadje wel een beetje koud, maar het is prive genoeg om je zwembroek niet nodig te hebben. Kamer en badkamer zijn riant en worden tweemaal daags schoongemaakt en de handdoeken aangevuld. Er zijn drie restaurants om gebruik van te maken. Een (Safron) ligt op een heuvel en bedient een wat luxer segment. Gewoon een keer doen.
Ook het ontbijt is erg uitgebreid en lekker. Je kunt een gratis fiets krijgen om over het complex te fietsen of bellen voor een Buggy als je je wilt verplaatsen
Wat erg fijn was is de persoonlijke aandacht. Bij het inchecken kregen wij een jongedame toegewezen, die ons begeleide in onze wensen op het gebied van reserveringen en transport van A naar B regelde. 
Ngoc (Jade) kwam iedere morgen bij het ontbijt vragen wat we vandaag in de planning hadden en kwam zelf ook met voorstellen. Vervolgens regelde ze dat dan. Erg fijn om zo ontzorgt te worden. Ze was ook via Whatsapp direct bereikbaar.
sample_comments.negatives:
De accommodatie ligt in een heel mooi gebied, maar daardoor wel afgelegen. Je kunt niet naar een dorpje fietsen. Wij zijn 's avond wel in het grootste dorp aan de lagoon wezen eten, maar dat is zo'n 20 km van de accommodatie verwijderd.
Kortom je bent aangewezen op de Banyan Treea en het zusterhotel ernaast.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing and high quality
sample_comments.text:
So glad I went to banyan tree and not angsana. It was a great trip, the chef treated me to a daily Vietnam food special and it was super. 

Relaxin,g, comfortable, high quality along with really lovely caring staff. 

I recommend it!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Andrew,
 
Thank you for sparing your valuable time to share with us this awesome review. We do look forward to welcoming you back at Banyan Tree Lang Co in the near future should your travels ever bring you back to Central Vietnam.
 
Best regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager

sample_comments.title: 自然の中の優雅なリゾートホテル
sample_comments.positives: 自然が豊かで人里離れた所でしたが楽しくて3日間の時間はすぐに過ぎてしまいました。今回はのんびりしたくてホテルのみで過ごしました。空港にも迎えにきてくださって助かりました。ホテルのアクティビティが充実していて外に出なくても割となんでもできますし散策するだけでも時間が過ぎます。芝にはリスがいたり見たことのない鳥がいたり歩くだけで楽しかったです。シーズン終盤に行ったので波が高くて海に入れなかったのが残念ですがビーチでも散策したりマウンテンバギー（アクティビティ）で海岸を走ったり満喫しました。早朝に日の出も見に行きました、とても綺麗です。レストランはどこも美味しかったですがなんと言っても朝食が豪華。珍しいフエ料理もあって幾つか食べることができました。移動はカートもありますが自転車を借りることもできます、子供用の自転車もありました。ビラに宿泊しましたが庭でBBQを注文できます。量が多くて美味しかったのに残してしまって申し訳なかったです。2人用でしたが女性なら3人分くらいありましたので満足できると思います。アフタヌーンティーも頼みました、量より質という感じでお菓子もですがお茶がとても品があって美味しかったです。全て予約制で慣れれば簡単で色々と選べていいです。とにかく全てがホテル内で完結できるのでゆっくりしたい方や長居したい方には最適な場所です。
sample_comments.negatives: ないです

The staff is warm and friendly.

Good location. The facility is ok. The lagoon room got a nice view. The seaview villa got a nice view and heated pool. 
The staffs are ok, I was impressed with TY from the breakfast. Otherwise, some staffs may need be trained more, as they care for the foreigner than Vietnameses, that made my husband felt uncomfortable.

sample_comments.positives: הצוות היה מעולה ועזר לנו בהכל. הארוחת בוקר מעולה והחדר היה ממש מעולה.
sample_comments.negatives: כלום, היה מעולה.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic Stay
sample_comments.text:
It was all we could have asked for except that we wished there would be some type of real authentic local Vietnamese foods some where near the resort since we had limited time in Hue and it was important to me to taste every local foods I could find. 

The breakfast was to die for. I could not say enough about the fruits and vegetables as well as all types of juices, dairy and deli. It was organic and all meat was lean and delicious prepared, cooked just about right. 

Within the resort where it surrounded by the natural beauty- ocean and mountains and, each villa comes with small ponds, and around it, there were songs sang by frags and ducks next to our pool which made us feel as much close to nature as we could never had... 

Biking was another activities we enjoyed...It was lovely for people who come from a big metropolitan city where biking was not as easy as most towns or less traffic places. What a wonderful way to browse the beauty of the resort.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Vị trí đẹp, yên tĩnh, phong cảnh hữu tình, lãng mạn
sample_comments.negatives: Các góc giường nhọn rất dễ gây chấn thương chân nếu vô tình va vào.

sample_comments.title: Wow
sample_comments.text: I read a couple of Agoda reviews before booking, so our expectations were high. Having stayed in Banyan Tree hotels before, we knew about the standards. The location is secluded and the weather wasn't great (rainshowers), but the heated jacuzzi in the beachfront poolvilla, the nice staff and the very nice hotel made up for it. Would definitely come back again! Best baby cod by the way our little one has slept in so far!

sample_comments.title: tốt
sample_comments.positives: phục vụ
sample_comments.negatives: chỉ dẫn vào resort chưa rõ ràng

sample_comments.title: Excellent Stay and Service with Banyan Tree
sample_comments.text: Celebrated wife's Birthday with Banyan Tree@Lang Co. Was pleasantly surprised with a nice cake and decorated flower bed on the day itself. Special mention to Ms Hoang Lan Dao and her team who took good care of us during our stay. The complimentary shuttle from air port works well for us travelling to Lang Co for the first time. Also the free shuttle to Hue, Hoi An is a plus for any traveller to base in Lang Co. Overall, it was a very pleasant trip for both of us. Facilities are new and the breakfast with free flow champagne makes it a real value stay. Definitely recommend Banyan Tree to anyone who wants to make this a memorable experience.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, mến khách, cảnh quan rất đẹp, nhiều hoạt động cho trẻ em.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay during a strong typhoon
sample_comments.text:
Unluckily, we stay in a great ocean view pool villa during a crazy typhoon. It keeps raining on our arrival, day trip to Hue and facing a typhoon on the day we plan to enjoy the villa and facilities in the hotel.
However, our villa host - Nina and most of the staffs make us a wonderful stay in Banyan Tree. They are all very initial to serve you, concerns your needs and problem solving immediately.
Such as the concierge remind us Saffron, their signature restaurant will be closed on Wed and Thu, so we can catch our first try on our arrival nights, the only night we can dine there. Housekeeping found the toilet not flush well and contact technician team to fix immediately, turn down service and small gifts from Nina are surprising us everyday, really consider of our needs which a fruit platter and bubble bath are ready after our day trip to Hue.
We have a great and unforgettable stay with the only sunshine farewell us on our leaving...

sample_comments.title: Rất tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Tất cả nhân viên đều thân thiện và đem lại cảm giác an bình cho du khách, tôi đến hơi sớm nhưng NV đã cho tôi trải nghiệm rất tuyệt vời, tôi chưa nhận được cách ứng xử tốt như vậy từ trước đến nay. Host Phụng đã tổ chức sinh Nhật cho bé con tôi lên 6 tuổi, bạn Cúc dịu dàng và đem đến trải nghiệm khó quên. Tôi sẽ cùng gia đình đến vào một ngày thích hợp
sample_comments.negatives: Không có

sample_comments.title: A whole villa & pool to ourselves. This is the best room I ever have!
sample_comments.text:
Unlimited French champagne for breakfast & big fruit basket in room daily.
Staff are very professional. The Saffron restaurant food is excellent. Hand wash ceremony before dinner is impressive. Overall, Banyan Tree has exceeded my expectations.

sample_comments.positives: Все было прекрасно, очень красивая территория отеля, виллы, природа.
sample_comments.negatives: Слишком дорогие услуги в спа и ресторане.

sample_comments.positives: Jeśli szukacie definicji prawdziwego, nieprzerysowanego luksusu, świętego spokoju i obsługi, która czyta w myślach - Banyan Tree jest odpowiedzią. sample_comments.title: Best resort overall in vietnam
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in 5 star hotels and resorts 99% during our trips, in and out of vietnam. I must say that I am very impressed by the high level of service provided in banyan tree lang co. The staffs were extremely caring from the smallest thing, excellent jobs banyan tree lang co staffs! 
The resort is Very beautiful, view from my 2 bedrooms hilltop villa is breathtaking.
We will be back for more experiences regarding the activities provided by the resort.
I would recommend this 5 star resort for anyone.
sample_comments.positives: Service, location, rooms

sample_comments.title: Splendid experience
sample_comments.text: My wife and I were celebrating our wedding anniversary at Banyan Tree Lang Co. It was an amazing experience for the two of us. Our villa host Thuy was extremely thoughtful and spoiled us by offering excellent butler service. When we went out to Lang Co village for seafood dinner, to our surprise, a staff (Nina) of Banyan Tree was waiting at the restaurant. She helped us to order food and making sure we were well taken care of before she left. Tiny surprises everyday really topped our experience. My sincere thanks to the hotel staff once again and we will definitely visit the hotel in the future.
sample_comments.positives: Very attentive staff, service with a touch of heart, live like a king

sample_comments.title: Найкращий готель з найкращими краєвидами
sample_comments.positives: Я дуже давно й багато подорожую, але це був мій найкращий відпочинок! З найкращою віллою з видом на мільйон! Чудовий персонал, смачна їжа, прекрасна йога, море, природа... Цей готель тепер номер 1 у моєму списку!
sample_comments.negatives: Немає такого

sample_comments.title: Quiet, romantic & privat stay
sample_comments.text: Just great. From the first minute u been like a VIP. All staff call us by our name even we not seem them before. Also remember our villa no. The food at breakfast was best i ever had in any banyan tree. Saffron with the thai food seems strange when u travelling in Vietnam but how they prepared the food was outstanding and first class tasting. As our flight leaves at evening Banyan Tree let us stay the whole day in our villa... amazing. All other places we been before we had to pay or even it was not possible. At Banyan Tree Lang Co u feel as VIP Guest until u leave the limousine at the airport. We will be back.... thanks to all the staffs
sample_comments.positives: Staff, beach villa, food

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Hlavně zaměstnanci
sample_comments.negatives: Jidlo

sample_comments.title: Superb service
sample_comments.text: Great resort and ambience was perfect. Scenery was outstanding. Location on the other hand was not as convenient as we would have liked.
sample_comments.positives: The best.hotel service we have received to date. All the staff at the resort were very friendly, attentive and always wanting to please. One could not ask for more from a service angle.

sample_comments.title: Overordnet godt men med en meget ubehagelig episode
sample_comments.positives: Villaen var lækker. Dog var vandtrykket meget lavt indenfor. God morgenmad. Dejlig strand. God rengøring
sample_comments.negatives: Havde en meget ubehagelig episode med en ansat på cocktail baren, der havde et attitude problem. Jeg sagde at jeg havde brug for 2 minutter mere til at kigge på menuen før jeg bestille. Han kom tilbage og modtog bestillingen uden at kigge på os og virkede flabet. Da han kom tilbage med drikkevarerne kiggede han mig direkte i øjnene og sagde at jeg virkede meget ulykkelig i dag, og om jeg havde et problem. Ret voldsom episode man ikke ville forvente af et resort af den standard. Da vi klagede over oplevelsen var folk gode til at undskylde, men det var en lidt nærig kompensation at vi kun fik refundereret vores 2 happy hour drinks, når hele vores aften blev ødelagt. Det havde været på sin plads at refunderer os for en hel overnatning, da denne episode ikke må ske, når man betaler så mange penge. Så forventer man også en vis standard. Har aldrig oplevet en så dårlig service oplevelse før og vi har efterhånden været en del forskellige steder.

sample_comments.title: Brilliant Hotel
sample_comments.text:
Will surely come back for vacation... 

Thx the chef for sharing with me the recipe
sample_comments.positives: Nice Staffs and Services, Great Room, and Superb Environment

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Lokalita, personal, servis a vysoka uroven sukromia
sample_comments.negatives: velmi maly vyber restauracii, kvalita jedla v Saffron bola myslim nedostacujuca

sample_comments.title: A paradise on earth, a sanctuary for the senses
sample_comments.text: A most pleasurable experience, a paradise on earth. Great golf at the adjacent Banyan Tree Langco Golf Course. A well designed integrated resort with comfortable and private villas, great food, quirky bars, and a well equipped gym. The staff went out of their to ensure a superlative customer experience, anticipating your needs and ensuring all your creature comforts are met. The view of the sea next to the villas is breathtaking and the room is designed to maximize the enjoyment and relaxation of the guests. The entire experience was seamless and superlative. The facilities for recreation and dining are world class as is the attention of all staff. Will be back!
sample_comments.positives: Very relaxing landscaped grounds, comfortable and spacious villas, attentive and caring staff

sample_comments.title: Not the luxury experience we expected
sample_comments.positives:
- Very good communication with the hotel before our arrival, despite several last-minute flight changes.
- We received a warm and kind welcome upon arrival, despite it being 2 a.m.
- The hotel's location is beautiful, by the beach, surrounded by greenery and a peaceful canal - very relaxing atmosphere.
- The 1-bedroom villa was very spacious, with two toilets and a large bathroom featuring a bathtub with an ocean view.
- Excellent internet connection throughout the property.
- The buggy service was very responsive - quick to arrive whenever we called.
- The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options.
- A truly wonderful chef who went above and beyond to accommodate our tastes - she made a delicious lava cake, thank you!
- The Vietnamese cooking class on the boat along the small canal was a great experience - lots of fun and great food.
- Room service was quick and efficient.
- Restaurant staff were very friendly and welcoming.
- The massages were outstanding - even the complimentary 60-minute massage was perfect. The therapists took into account the areas to avoid and the preferred pressure.
- The small gift delivered each evening was a thoughtful and much-appreciated touch.
- The hotel manager was attentive and genuinely listened to guest feedback.
sample_comments.negatives:
- No introduction or tour of the villa was provided at check-in.
- We only learned three days after our arrival that we had a dedicated butler - when we met her at breakfast !
- Communication with our butler was confusing and unprofessional - a surprise birthday moment was ruined due to a lack of discretion and poor coordination.
- Staff overall lacked the training expected from a high-end hotel.
- No effort was made to manage food allergies, despite having informed the staff in advance. One guest allergic to corn was served corn on the first night. Another, intolerant to seafood, was served fish chips. And coriander was served at nearly every meal, despite us stating clearly that we couldn't eat it.
- Activities offered by the hotel were unorganized and felt rushed or improvised.
- The outdoor area of the villa was completely neglected, which diminished the beauty of the place (see photo of the villa entrance).
- The villa was in need of renovation - damaged wallpaper and outdated decor.
- Housekeeping in the villa was sloppy - not only were there fingerprints on glass surfaces, but also smudges and marks in more intimate areas, clearly left by previous guests.
- Cleaning was not done while we were at breakfast unless we specifically called to request it. Otherwise, staff showed up while we were in the villa.
- The beach was not very attractive, though it was relatively clean.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful hotel
sample_comments.text: The staff are very attentive but not intruding. A very quiet location at the border of an excellent beach. The food is very good. We are very thankful for the excellent arrangement made by the staff for my wife's birthday. As a very new hotel, it is expected that the service could be further improved in future when the staff are getting more familiar with the facilities and different types of customers. After all, it was a very enjoyable and memorable stay.
sample_comments.positives: Excellent service, excellent ambience, beautiful beach

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
The statt and manager were outstanding in their support.
Great sea view rooms
Good food, breakfast included
sample_comments.negatives: Photos do not match reality

sample_comments.title: A paradise on earth
sample_comments.text: Amazing scenery; friendliest stuff; amazing breakfast; great service. The most impressive thing for us was the destination dinner. Above expectation in every aspect
sample_comments.response:
Dear LU,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted you enjoyed the scenery, our friendly team, breakfast, and service. It is especially rewarding to hear that the destination dinner exceeded your expectations- this means a lot to us. 

We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable experience.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Luxurious hotel to recharge with fantastic staff.
sample_comments.positives: Amazing location, the villas on the Hill side are truly stunning with fantastic views and wonderful spaces to be in. The restaurants all serve delicious food and the staff are always smiling and keen to help.
sample_comments.negatives: It's a big site and you really do need the buggies to get everywhere. Whilst this is fine, you do have to plan with a bit of time to get where you want to go.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing resort with everything you need
sample_comments.text: It was an amazing experience at this resort. The staff are all friendly and helpful. The General Manager even came out to greet us when we arrived. It's very relaxing with everything that you need and the smells just make you want to take it all in. The only problem with this resort is that you won't want to leave.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Pedram,

Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are truly delighted to hear that you had such an amazing and relaxing experience with us. Your kind words about our friendly and attentive team mean a great deal to us.

We especially happy to know that the atmosphere and signature scents made your stay even more memorable. And yes, we completely understand how hard it can be to leave. We sincerely hope to welcome you back to enjoy even more moments of relaxation at our resort in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: 10/10 for staff and service. Great for a few days to disconnect and fully relax.
sample_comments.positives: staff and service exceptional. great breakfast. Good spa. Villas private and well maintained.
sample_comments.negatives: location is remote. nothing much to do, unless you play golf

sample_comments.title: Fabulous
sample_comments.text: Property is excellent and service is amazing
sample_comments.response:
Dear Suyn,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your wonderful feedback on your recent stay at Banyan Tree Lăng Cô. It was truly our pleasure to have you with us, and we look forward to welcoming you back for even more seamless experiences in the future.

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: Lovely quiet, comfortable location for a peaceful break.
sample_comments.positives: Lovely villa. Great Breakfast. Very helpful and friendly staff.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful stay
sample_comments.text: We had high expectations going into our stay and Banyan Tree Lang Co matched or exceeded all of these. Excellent amenities in a stunning resort - it is as the pictures show. Service was impeccable from every staff member we encountered, from management who'd go out of their way to ask about our stay and for feedback, and grounds staff who'd always have a smile and greeting "xin chao" to offer. As some have noted, the location is remote, but we found this to be a lovely base for day excursions out to explore the different cities of Central Vietnam - and of course there are many activities, relaxation and dining options within Banyan Tree and the adjoining Angsana Lang Co property. We'd strongly recommended Banyan Tree Lang Co and look forward to staying again!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Emily,

Thank you very much for sharing such a wonderful review.

We are truly delighted to know that Banyan Tree Lăng Cô met and exceeded your expectations. Your kind words about the genuine warmth of our team are deeply appreciated, especially your recognition of the care shown by both our management and grounds staff.

We are pleased that you enjoyed our tranquil location as a base to explore Central Vietnam, as well as the diverse activities, relaxation, and dining options within Banyan Tree and Angsana Lăng Cô. Thank you for your strong recommendation, and we very much look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay.

Warm regards,

Warm regards,

Franck Rodriguez
Area General Manager.

sample_comments.title: A very relaxing and enjoyable stay
sample_comments.positives: Staff, location, breakfast, facilities
sample_comments.negatives: Signature Thais food quality did not match price

A very pleasant stay at this resort to relax. Very good facilities as well. 

All the staff whom we interacted with were very friendly and attentive (buggy service, housekeeping, front of office, restaurant staff, Spa). Name of some of the staff - Ms. Jade, Mr.
